title: Thin Blade Sword
description: No more thick and ugly swords, make them thinner and aesthetic.
body:
Basic lightweight resource pack to change the face texture of the Minecraft swords. Great for classic PvP veterans who are used to thinner swords.

- Great for PvP and PvE.
- Less screen coverage.
- Different aesthetic.
- Realistic aesthetic.
- Vanilla-like textures.
